content.boundary: Bounded to evidence and monitoring architecture; does not change service delivery, placement rules, gatekeeping structure, or finance formulas
content.change_lever: Creation of a mandated, harmonized statistical and monitoring architecture with disaggregation by category, region, gender, and demographic driver, plus a standing analytic capacity to test competing explanations
content.name: Build a reconciled national SEN measurement and monitoring architecture
content.system_problem: Multiple inconsistent statistical series (varying baselines, cross-level vs. primary-only totals, differing reference populations) prevent policymakers from knowing whether the identification rise reflects true prevalence change, definitional change, access change, or incentive effects, undermining any evidence-based response
